## Question / Goal
State the design or mathematical question precisely.

## Constraints
- Must remain compatible with certificate schema v1.x?
- Must be backend-agnostic?
- Must be certifiable (proof-carrying)?

What artifact this design work must produce.

- [ ] Pseudocode

- [ ] Test plan / goldens

What decision is being made.
- Option A:

## Risks / open points
What could still be ambiguous?

## Done when
- [ ] Design doc merged
- [ ] Flow/spec updated
- [ ] Implementation issues created (linked)
